flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Wisconsin-Parkside fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2k → 2.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Wisconsin-Parkside rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.4k → $8.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Wisconsin-Parkside rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.7k → $17.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Wisconsin-Parkside fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.1% → 0.0%).
